templates.name: Does your mattress work with an adjustable base?
templates.content: All of our mattresses will work with an adjustable base.

templates.name: How long does it take for my mattress to air out/decompress?
templates.content:
We recommend allowing your mattress to sit between 3-5 hours before laying on it. Note that while the majority of decompression occurs within the first few minutes of unboxing, decompression does continue for up to 24 hours after unwrapping. 

Also, keep in mind that the natural odor in your mattress may take about 24 hours after unpacking to entirely dissipate.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://brooklynbedding.com/blog/standard-mattress-sizes

templates.name: Can I use/stack the military discount with another one?
templates.content: No discounts ever stack on our site. The military discount does increase when our sales increase (so if onsite sale is 30%, the military discount will be 35%), but both cannot be used simultaneously.

templates.name: Do you offer custom sizes?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't offer custom sizes at the moment.

templates.name: I want to try/test a mattress at your store
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/showrooms I would highly suggest giving the store a call first to check if it's available.

templates.name: I'm looking for RV mattresses
templates.content: Awesome! You can check them out here: https://rvmattress.com/collections/mattresses

templates.name: First responder discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/first-responders-discount

templates.name: Student discount
templates.content: We do offer student discounts! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/student-discount

templates.name: Educator / teacher discount
templates.content: We do offer an educator's discount. You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/educator-discount

templates.name: Will Box Springs work for my mattress?
templates.content: Any type of support system that provides minimal to no flex will work with our mattress. This includes most platform, slat, and box spring foundations. If you need a foundation for your new mattress, check out our foundations specifically designed for our mattresses: https://brooklynbedding.attn.tv/sl/kUFvtdwF

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/showrooms

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/brooklynbedding/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/BrooklynBedding

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to get more info on wholesale is to email us directly at: wholesale@brooklynbedding.com Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly from here: https://support.brooklynbedding.com/hc/en-us/requests/new Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All mattresses are assembled in our Phoenix, Arizona facility and shipped directly to your door. We use source materials both domestically and internationally and assemble each mattress in our facility to give us complete control over quality.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Standard production time is typically 2-5 business days. Once your mattress ships, delivery generally takes 1-5 business days via FedEx for domestic orders.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can find our return policy here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/return-policy?utm_campaign=concierge&utm_medium=sms&utm_source=attentive&externalId=FIaUk

templates.name: Weight of the Chill Memory Foam - Short Queen
templates.content: The chill memory foam in short queen 6" and 8" weighs approximately 45lbs. The 10" is approx 55lbs, the 12" is approximately 65lbs, and the 14" is approximately 75lbs.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://support.brooklynbedding.com/hc/en-us/articles/4420656200087-How-long-is-your-warranty-

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We provide free FedEx ground shipping on all products to all contiguous U.S. States (excluding Alaska & Hawaii).

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly from here: https://support.brooklynbedding.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

templates.name: Do you sell mattress toppers?
templates.content: Yes, we do sell them in-store or online at: mattresstopper.com

templates.name: Can I use an adjustable base with your mattress?
templates.content: Yes, Brooklyn Bedding mattresses can be used with adjustable bases and we sell one as an option: https://brooklynbedding.com/collections/adjustable-bases

templates.name: Do you offer financing/split payments?
templates.content: Yes! We offer financing through Affirm. You can read more about it here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/financing

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at +1 623-624-1222 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: California Ony Mattress Disposal. Not available in other states
templates.content: California residents can opt for a haul-away service by filling out a form here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/california-mattress-haul-away-form There's no charge for this service. All retrieved mattresses will be recycled and can't be returned to you.

templates.name: Haul Away / Dispose of Old Mattress (Non-California)
templates.content: Unfortunately, we don't provide a removal service to haul away old mattresses, except when we deliver to California residents, however, there are third-party services such as goloadup.com and byebyemattress.com that provide removal of old mattresses for a service fee.

templates.name: Military discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/military-discount

templates.name: Are your pillow covers washable?
templates.content: All of our pillow covers are washable. Simply remove the cover, wash on your gentlest machine setting, and then tumble dry low or lay flat to dry.

templates.name: Do your sheets fit on a mattress that are more than 11” thick?
templates.content: Yes! Our sheets are designed to fit mattresses with a thickness of 11''-14''.

templates.name: Does the Bi-Fold Foundation come with a frame?
templates.content: The Bi-Fold foundation doesn't come with a frame at this time.

templates.name: Is the mattress protector hypoallergenic?
templates.content: Yes! All of our mattress protectors feature a hypoallergenic design to safeguard against bacteria, bed bugs, and dust mites.

templates.name: How long does it take for my mattress to break-in?
templates.content: Typically, you should expect that your mattress will take around 30-45 nights to entirely break-in and the same amount of time for your body to adjust to the sensation of a new mattress. During this period of time, your mattress will reach its optimal softness and become fully aerated.

templates.name: Are your mattress protectors waterproof?
templates.content:
Most of our mattress protectors are water-resistant. We do have two protectors that are 100% waterproof and you can check them out below. 

- Mattress Encasement: https://brooklynbedding.com/products/deep-pocket-mattress-encasement 
-  Deep Pocket Mattress Protector: https://brooklynbedding.com/products/new-deep-pocket-mattress-protector

templates.name: Products too expensive
templates.content: Thanks for your feedback, I'll share future deals that may interest you since we'd love to change your mind! In the meantime you can check out our financing options here: https://brooklynbedding.com/pages/financing

templates.name: Can my item be shipped later or delivery be scheduled?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are not able to schedule any dates of delivery or hold the order to arrive later.

templates.name: Price Matching
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are not able to price match with third-party retailers.

templates.name: do you have any foldable or hinged mattresses
templates.content: Unfortunately, we do not have any foldable or hinged mattresses and are not able to build any custom size.

templates.name: Are the Titan Mattress latex free?
templates.content: The Titan mattresses are latex-free.
